text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I'd like to buy those beans and some
fresh milk, pl—

text_block_list.name: Store Employee
text_block_list.text: You've got quite the eye for quality beans, miss!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I heard you carry very high-quality goods
here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Trainer! Not exactly... I need them for
Grandmother's special sweet bean soup.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's something she used to make for me when I was
sick in bed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I close my eyes, I can still recall its gentle
warmth... I want to try and replicate that flavor
myself.
choice_data_list: I'd love to try it too.
I'd love to try it too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? You?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Not that I mind, but... W-well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's not it at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is a rare opportunity for you to taste a dish
from the esteemed Mejiro family. I will do my best
to make sure it is worthy of the name!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've been given permission to use the cafeteria
kitchen. My preparations are complete. Now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
J-just a moment! Let's see... According to what
Grandmother taught me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's right! The beans! The first thing is to
simmer the beans! I remember it perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer. May I ask you a question?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How does one… "simmer" something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, nothing! Never mind! What I meant to say
was, well... Umm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I have a confession to make. I'm still learning how to cook, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I don't think I can replicate the dish faithfully.
choice_data_list: I can lend you a hand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Really? I feel guilty after promising to make it for
you, but... I'd gladly accept your help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first thing to do is to explain what simmering
is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see, low heat to make the mixture bubble. I shall
begin at once!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Forgive me. How low should the heat be, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro McQueen struggles through the
unfamiliar art of cooking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's finished! Hehe, the sweet fragrance of the milk
matches my childhood memories to a T!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But of course I did. Recreating
Grandmother's cooking calls for nothing short of
my best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And... I also have you to thank for assisting me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, as a sign of my gratitude, I shall let
you have the first taste. Go ahead, try it while it's
still warm.
choice_data_list: Let's take our time and enjoy it together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother once said something very similar a
long time ago...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She told me the best thing for a cold was to eat
this soup together. And she was right. I forgot all
about how sick I was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Making good memories from difficult times...
That's what this recipe means to me.
choice_data_list: Let's make some new memories together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's. Now, without further ado...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I eat the milky white soup
together. The flavor is exquisite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Take care not to burn yourself drinking it that
fast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? ...Hehe, I'm glad. I'm not yet
accustomed to cooking, so hearing that is a relief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
From now on, this dish will always remind me of
spending time together with you as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first time cooking together has turned out to
be a rousing success.
